positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a roaring celestial Bengal tiger stalking through an abstract jungle of bioluminescent flora. The tiger should have strong, bold black stripes against vibrant orange and gold fur, rendered in a clean, vector-art silhouette style. The background should feature simplified, glowing vines, stylized jungle leaves, and geometric patterns that evoke both nature and cosmic energy. Focus on dynamic pose, strong contrast between the animal's silhouette and the glowing background. High detail, symmetry, perfect composition for apparel, suitable for DTG print, ultra-sharp focus, pop art colors.
negative: blur, out of focus, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, noise, artifacts, messy composition, messy background, realistic photography, grayscales, monochrome
